subcodes.first_line: Hearken unto the divine Call, and with penetrating vision and illumined heart, ponder the wondrous words He hath revealed, and meditate thereon [3.5s]... ...Praise be to Thee, O my God!  I beseech Thee by Thy Most Great Name, whereby the Sun of Thy Command shone forth above the horizon of Thine inspiration
subcodes.first_line_orig: بشنوید ندای الهی را و ببصر حدید و قلب منیر در کلمات بدیعش نظر نمائید و تفکر
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
